title: MAAW
description: mod with effects, cool swords and much more and this is just the beginning
body:
the mod adds new armor and weapons (some items have particles and effects) some swords and armor will give different effects which can make the game easier (I advise you to download more mods for enemies so that it is not too easy) the mod is not bad for dads since new weapons add interest
(go to the Discord server)
2 my mod since the mod about drones did not work due to a mob error, it is impossible to fix this, but I decided to make a mod specifically for weapons and armor (enjoy the game)
